title: phyla nodiflora var. nodiflora
intro: Phyla nodiflora var. nodiflora, commonly known as Lippia or Marsh Leatherflower, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phyla nodiflora var. nodiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Phyla nodiflora var. nodiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
